chronos 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    Bibliography

Duration of Time Series

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/time.R
span.Rd

Get the duration expressed in rata die.

Usage

span(x)

# S4 method for RataDie
span(x)

# S4 method for TimeSeries
span(x)

Arguments

x

A TimeSeries object.

Value

A numeric vector.

See also

Other time series tools: plot(), series(), start(), time(), window()

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Create time-series of 100 observations

## Univariate
## Sampled every years starting from 1099 BCE
(X <- series(rnorm(100), time = 1099:1000, calendar = BCE()))
#> 1 time series observed between -401766 and -365607 r.d.

start(X)
#> [1] -401766
end(X)
#> [1] -365607
span(X)
#> [1] 36159
time(X)
#>   [1] -401766 -401401 -401036 -400671 -400305 -399940 -399575 -399210 -398844
#>  [10] -398479 -398114 -397749 -397383 -397018 -396653 -396288 -395922 -395557
#>  [19] -395192 -394827 -394461 -394096 -393731 -393366 -393000 -392635 -392270
#>  [28] -391905 -391539 -391174 -390809 -390444 -390078 -389713 -389348 -388983
#>  [37] -388617 -388252 -387887 -387522 -387156 -386791 -386426 -386061 -385695
#>  [46] -385330 -384965 -384600 -384234 -383869 -383504 -383139 -382773 -382408
#>  [55] -382043 -381678 -381312 -380947 -380582 -380217 -379851 -379486 -379121
#>  [64] -378756 -378390 -378025 -377660 -377295 -376929 -376564 -376199 -375834
#>  [73] -375468 -375103 -374738 -374373 -374007 -373642 -373277 -372912 -372546
#>  [82] -372181 -371816 -371451 -371085 -370720 -370355 -369990 -369624 -369259
#>  [91] -368894 -368529 -368163 -367798 -367433 -367068 -366702 -366337 -365972
#> [100] -365607

## Multivariate
## Sampled every century starting from 1000 CE
(Y <- series(matrix(rnorm(300), 100, 3), time = 1000:1099, calendar = CE()))
#> 3 time series observed between 364878 and 401037 r.d.

start(Y)
#> [1] 364878
end(Y)
#> [1] 401037
span(Y)
#> [1] 36159
time(Y)
#>   [1] 364878 365243 365608 365973 366338 366704 367069 367434 367799 368165
#>  [11] 368530 368895 369260 369626 369991 370356 370721 371087 371452 371817
#>  [21] 372182 372548 372913 373278 373643 374009 374374 374739 375104 375470
#>  [31] 375835 376200 376565 376931 377296 377661 378026 378392 378757 379122
#>  [41] 379487 379853 380218 380583 380948 381314 381679 382044 382409 382775
#>  [51] 383140 383505 383870 384236 384601 384966 385331 385697 386062 386427
#>  [61] 386792 387158 387523 387888 388253 388619 388984 389349 389714 390080
#>  [71] 390445 390810 391175 391541 391906 392271 392636 393002 393367 393732
#>  [81] 394097 394463 394828 395193 395558 395924 396289 396654 397019 397385
#>  [91] 397750 398115 398480 398846 399211 399576 399941 400307 400672 401037

On this page

chronos is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.
